bets.game: Gold Coast Suns v Hawthorn Hawks
bets.notes: Would have placed this — missed tonight. Tracking from next round.

bets.game: Greater Western Sydney Giants v Carlton Blues
bets.notes: Model edge: Cerra bayesianEdge +15.8, Newman +6.8. Both confirmed named, no injury flags. Shrunk EV ~+15%. FINAL: Cerra 18 disposals (needed 17+), Newman 25 disposals (needed 19+). Both hit clean — the held-vs-cashout call earlier in the session paid off.

bets.game: Greater Western Sydney Giants v Carlton Blues
bets.notes: Self-placed by Jack. Model-implied fair odds 2.52 (got better price at 2.66). Shrunk SR 43.3%, shrunk EV +15.3%, Kelly 0.092. Note: 2 of 3 legs are same player (Acres) — correlated, not fully independent legs. FINAL: Smith only had 1 clearance (needed 3+) — this is the leg that sank it. Both Acres legs hit (3 tackles, 13 kicks vs 2+/10+ needed). Same correlated-pair pattern as before: the weakest, lowest-edge leg (Smith, +2.6 edge) was the one that missed, while the stronger-edge legs held up.

Self-placed by Jack. Rachele and Bowey both hit. Rankine's 1+ goal leg (the strongest-edge leg, +16.5, 85.9% model rate) is what missed. This is normal goal-kicking variance, not a calibration failure — goals are a low-base-rate binary stat, so even a well-priced 86% leg will miss roughly 1 in 7 times. Don't read this as the model being wrong; the edge assessment was sound, the bet just lost on variance.

bets.game: Collingwood Magpies v Port Adelaide Power
bets.notes: Jack chose Drew 4+ over the model-optimal 5+ (Kelly 0.192 vs 0.28 once the 0.94 calibration shrink is applied — confirmed in this session's line-selection fix). Still a reasonable, lower-variance bet, just not the highest-Kelly version. Both legs confirmed named, no injury flags. FINAL: Butters had 25 disposals (needed 27+, missed by 2), Drew got exactly 4 tackles (hit the 4+ line). Butters' disposals leg sank it — close miss, not a bad read, just fell short.

bets.game: Collingwood Magpies v Port Adelaide Power
bets.notes: Live price verified by Jack matched model data closely (1.63 vs 1.62). Shrunk SR 70.0%, shrunk EV +14.1%, Kelly 0.225 — best clean single left in the game after Drew/Butters disposals used in bet #5. Considered adding Jack Crisp 15+/16+ disposals as a 2nd leg but both lines were deeply negative Kelly (-1.66 / -1.11, bookmaker priced too efficiently) — correctly skipped. FINAL: Butters had 18 kicks (needed 14+) — hit clean despite his disposals leg in bet #5 falling short, showing the single was the better-isolated bet.

Backfilled — placed earlier in session, missed from initial log. Both legs hit clean: Langford got his 3+ marks, Gawn smashed the line with 28 disposals (vs 18+ threshold). At the time, raw EV was +6.8% at the model's reference price of $1.58 (actual price taken was $1.53), but shrunk EV (applying the documented overconfidence correction) was negative — model would have flagged this as -EV. Won anyway; good data point that a single overconfidence-corrected miss doesn't mean a bet was wrong, just variance, same as the Rankine goal miss being the opposite case.

bets.game: St Kilda Saints v Western Bulldogs
bets.notes: Missed the cut-off before placing — would have been a $7 stake. Both confirmed named (Sanders checked separately, Richards assumed same game). Sanders 12+ handballs: shrunk EV +2.3%, Kelly 0.065 — thin but genuine edge, not a standout vs other bets today. FINAL (no money, tracked for dataset only): Richards had 4 marks, Sanders had 20 handballs — both hit comfortably. Would have won ~$7.70 if placed.

bets.game: Richmond Tigers v North Melbourne Kangaroos
bets.notes: Backfilled — reported won by Jack, missed from initial log. Both legs hit clean.

Placed on Sportsbet per model suggestion — the safer of two combos considered tonight (vs. the higher-Kelly but coin-flip Jake Lloyd 6+ marks line, which was correctly skipped as too aggressive). Model reference price was $1.40 (Sportsbet odds on both legs: Dunkley $1.20, Lohmann $1.17); live price taken was $1.44, slightly better than modeled. Shrunk SR ~77.2%, Kelly 0.209. Both players confirmed in tonight's announced lineup.
